title: D-Log M workflow
summary: A 10-bit low-contrast profile designed for grading and wider highlight/shadow flexibility.
check: Lock white balance for matched clips
Apply DJI conversion LUT or a managed transform
Correct exposure and WB before creative grading
Export 10-bit through the grading pipeline where possible
warning: D-Log M is not a finished look and is not itself a LUT. Underexposed log footage becomes noisy when lifted.
